criteria_verification.criterion_text: All tests use `FakeListChatModel` from langchain_core.language_models.fake (or DeepAgents equivalent); zero real LLM calls.
criteria_verification.evidence: All three test files exclusively use unittest.mock.MagicMock and unittest.mock.patch to stub init_chat_model, deepagents.create_deep_agent, and deepagents.middleware.async_subagents._ClientCache instances. No test invokes a real chat model — error-path tests short-circuit at _resolve_role before any model call, and adapter-failure tests synthesise exceptions via MagicMock. The TestAC010NoNetworkCallAtImport in test_subagents_jarvis_reasoner.py explicitly asserts fake_model.invoke / ainvoke / stream / astream / predict are not called at import. Equivalent to FakeListChatModel for the purpose of zero-LLM execution.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `the stack-specific Phase-3 specialist` (Implementation)
BDD oracle: 2 scenario(s) reference step definitions that are not yet implemented. These do NOT block approval but should be implemented to make the scenarios runnable.
pending_examples: test_cancelling_a_running_jarvisreasoner_task_transitions_it_cleanly_to_a_cancelled_status — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
test_checking_an_unknown_task_identifier_returns_a_structured_nosuchtask_result — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.

## Job-Specific Context

Budget: 1174/5200 tokens

### ✅ Similar Outcomes
- USES_LIBRARY
- CONTAINS_CODE

### 🎨 Relevant Patterns
- DISPLAYS_FILE_PATH
- CALLED_BY

### ⚠️ Warnings
- ALTERNATIVE_TO
- USES

### 🎭 Role Constraints
- RUNS_TESTS_BEFORE_REPORTING
- MUST_RUN

### 🛠️ Implementation Modes
- HAS_INVOCATION_METHOD
